element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Character customization with 5 classes and 6 races
Tutorial-level combat during RAM attack on NEO facility
Introduction to parasitic infection threat and genetically engineered monsters (Gennies)
Party members infected; must acquire cure before progression
Scot.DOS becomes ship AI and narrative guide
Extended combat encounters with experimental creatures
Bluffing mechanics and social deception in tactical context
Introduction to Doomsday Laser narrative threat
Forced combat to escape; Buck Rogers joins party
Overhead and first-person view modes for terrain navigation
Trust mechanics tied to defensive mission success

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Mars - RAM attack on Desert Runners city

element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Destroyed village and refugee assistance mechanics
Complex multi-floor military facility with escalating encounters

element_introduction_order.element: Final boss - Doomsday Laser command center
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Culmination of all mechanics with high-difficulty battles and escape sequence

typical_relief_triggers: Successful mission completion and return to Salvation III
Acquisition of new ship or resource upgrade
typical_tension_triggers: RAM attack waves on allied positions
Parasitic infection threat to party members
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Gradual escalation from tutorial-level base defense to multi-planet infiltration campaign, with cyclical tension-release pattern across major mission objectives. Each new location introduces higher-difficulty encounters and increased narrative stakes.

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Derelict ships and abandoned facilities discoverable during patrol missions; side encounters with pirates

difficulty_curve.early_game: Tutorial-level base defense and first patrol mission with moderate Gennie encounters; introduction to party mechanics and combat systems
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Escalating facility infiltrations (Ceres asteroid, Mars Gradivus Mons); introduction of time-sensitive mission objectives and NPC faction mechanics; increasing gennie and soldier encounters
difficulty_curve.late_game: Multi-stage Mars and Venus base operations with maximal faction interaction; orbital station navigation with highest-difficulty enemy encounters; final Doomsday Laser command center with escape sequence
notable_spikes: Maelstrom Rider parasitic infection requiring immediate cure
RAM attack on Desert Runners city with tight success window
Space pirate capture and forced overthrow scenario
Mariposa Three military complex with series of escalating battles
Doomsday Laser final confrontation and massive explosion escape

notable_level_patterns.description: Player enters abandoned or compromised facility (derelict ship, base overrun by creatures/pirates). Must clear internal threat, acquire intelligence or resources, and escape safely. Ties to narrative progression.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Maelstrom Rider derelict ship; Ceres RAM base; Gradivus Mons Mars facility

notable_level_patterns.description: Player must defend allied NPC faction from incoming attack wave. Success determines faction trust level for subsequent infiltration missions. Creates gameplay-narrative coupling.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Desert Runners city defense on Mars against RAM attack

notable_level_patterns.description: Single mission objective spans multiple view modes (Solar System view → Overworld view → Adventuring view → Isometric combat) across different planetary locations, requiring navigation, resource management, and sequential combat encounters.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Mercury orbital complex via Mariposa Three

notable_level_patterns.description: Deep facility exploration with increasing difficulty per level/section. Each zone introduces harder enemies and combat encounters before climax battle.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Mariposa Three military complex leading to Doomsday Laser command center
